settings.title: Settings
settings.description: A clean settings workspace for account controls, security, appearance, and system defaults.
settings.language.title: Language Preferences
settings.language.description: Choose the language for the admin workspace and Divin8 responses.
settings.language.label: Preferred language
settings.language.hint: This setting persists locally for admin and is sent with each Divin8 chat request.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.subtitle: Theme and surface behavior
settings.appearance.description: Switch between dark, light, and system modes. Your choice is persisted locally and applied at the root level so the dashboard shell responds instantly.
settings.theme.lightDescription: Light neutral backgrounds and softer cards.
settings.preview.title: Live preview
settings.preview.cardTreatmentDescriptio: White cards in light mode, glassy surfaces in dark mode.
settings.preferences.title: System Preferences
settings.preferences.subtitle: Operational defaults
settings.preferences.description: Configure dashboard behavior, reporting defaults, and persistence for daily admin operations.
settings.preferences.autoRefreshHint: Keeps live dashboard widgets ready for future polling hooks.
settings.preferences.autoSaveHint: Keeps report editing defaults aligned with the existing reports workspace.
divin8.title: Divin8 Chat
divin8.description: Persistent Divin8 conversations with engine-backed insight, reusable session context, and exportable transcripts.
divin8.limitReached: You've reached the Seeker limit ({{limit}} insights).
divin8.guide.title: Divin8 Guide
divin8.guide.subtitle: Swipe across the cards to see how Divin8 collects input, routes systems, and keeps continuity alive.
divin8.guide.astrology.title: Astrology Input Guide
divin8.guide.astrology.body: Give birth date, exact birth time, and birth location together when you want a chart-backed astrology or Human Design reading.
divin8.guide.systems.title: Systems Overview
divin8.guide.systems.body: Divin8 now routes one primary system by default and only combines systems when you explicitly ask for comparison or synthesis.
divin8.guide.timeline.title: Insight Timeline
divin8.guide.timeline.body: Confirmed profile facts and meaningful thread events are carried forward so Divin8 can reuse memory without asking twice.
divin8.guide.image.title: Image Interpretation
divin8.guide.image.body: Uploaded images are handled as symbolic physiognomy only. Responses stay energetic, reflective, and non-diagnostic.
divin8.guide.synthesis.title: Synthesis Mode
divin8.guide.synthesis.body: Ask explicitly for synthesis when you want Divin8 to compare systems or weave multiple signals into one integrated reading.
divin8.timeline.title: Insight Timeline
divin8.timeline.subtitle: Live continuity for the active thread. Confirmed facts and recent engine moments stay visible here.
divin8.timeline.empty: Timeline events will appear here as the conversation builds memory.
divin8.rules.title: Divin8 Rules
divin8.rules.engine: Engine-backed systems are used for astrology, numerology, life path, blueprint, nakshatra, and planetary questions.
divin8.rules.context: Only the last conversation window is sent forward for GPT context so threads stay fast and focused.
divin8.rules.image: Image interpretation is symbolic, energetic, and non-diagnostic only.
divin8.debug.title: Pipeline Debug
divin8.conversations.noSearchResults: No conversations match this search yet.
divin8.conversations.empty: Start a new conversation to begin building Divin8 memory.
divin8.conversations.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action will remove it from your chat history.
divin8.conversations.systemPromptDescrip: Update tone and operational rules without restarting the conversation system.
divin8.window.empty: This conversation is empty. Ask Divin8 a question to start building thread memory and exportable history.
divin8.composer.placeholder: Ask Divin8 about astrology, numerology, life path, or upload an image for symbolic interpretation...
divin8.composer.unsupportedSpeech: Speech input not supported in this browser
prompt.title: Divin8 System Prompt
prompt.description: Control the live Divin8 Chat prompt without touching code or restarting the admin workflow.
prompt.changesApply: Changes apply to the next chat request immediately.
